meaning: n.<口>妈 [域] Morocco ,摩洛哥 MA :  文学硕士 (M.A.,Master of Arts)
examples: Ma was still at work when I got back.
Ma threw that out. She said it smelled.
As for where to see performances year round, besides the new Yau Ma Tei Theatre?
Around that time Kerns met Ma at a poker game set up by a common friend.
